stmt: ∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [Prov α] [Reft α] [APS α] [C5 α], Nonempty (GödelFixpoint α) ↔ ⊠⊠(⊤ : α) ≐ ⊠⊤
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [Prov α] [Reft α] [APS α] [C5 α] {g h : GödelFixpoint α}, g.1 ≐ h.1
∃ (α : Type*), ACR α ∧ ACR.Prov α ∧ ACR.Reft α ∧ ACR.APS α ∧ ACR.C5 α ∧ Nonempty (ACR.HenkinFixpoint α) ∧ ¬ Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α)
∃ (α : Type*), ACR α ∧ ACR.Prov α ∧ ACR.Reft α ∧ ACR.APS α ∧ ACR.C5 α ∧ ¬ ACR.Consistent α ∧ Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α)
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) → Nonempty (ACR.HenkinFixpoint α)
∀ (α : Type*) [Subsingleton α] [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], ¬ ACR.Consistent α ∧ Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α)
∃ (α : Type*) (_ : ACR α) (_ : ACR.Prov α) (_ : ACR.Reft α) (_ : ACR.APS α), ACR.Consistent α ∧ (⊠⊠(⊤ : α) ≐ ⊠(⊤ : α)) ∧ ¬ Nonempty (ACR.HenkinFixpoint α)
∀ (α : Type*) [Finite α] [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], ACR.Consistent α → (⊠⊠(⊤ : α) ≐ ⊠(⊤ : α)) → Nonempty (ACR.HenkinFixpoint α)
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], (∃ x : α, x ≤ □x ∧ Set.Finite {y : α | ∃ n : ℕ, (Function.iterate (fun z => □z) n x) = y}) → Nonempty (ACR.HenkinFixpoint α)
∀ (α : Type*) [Finite α] [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], Nonempty (ACR.HenkinFixpoint α)

∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], ACR.Consistent α → Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) → ¬ Nonempty (ACR.HenkinFixpoint α) → ∀ g : ACR.GödelFixpoint α, Set.Infinite {y : α | ∃ n : ℕ, ((fun z => □z)^[n]) g.1 = y}

∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) → (∃ g : ACR.GödelFixpoint α, ∃ m n : ℕ, m < n ∧ ((fun z => □z)^[m]) g.1 ≐ ((fun z => □z)^[n]) g.1) → Nonempty (ACR.HenkinFixpoint α)
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] (c : α), (Monotone (fun x : α => □x)) → ((∃ hR : ACR.Reft α, ∃ hA : @ACR.APS α _ _ hR, ∀ x : α, @ACR.Reft.reft α _ hR x = c) ↔ ((⊤ : α) ≤ c ∧ c ≤ □c))
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] (c : α), let hR : ACR.Reft α := { reft := fun _ : α => c }; (@ACR.APS α _ _ hR ↔ (Monotone (fun x : α => □x) ∧ (⊤ : α) ≤ c ∧ c ≤ □c))
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α], (∃ c : α, let hR : ACR.Reft α := { reft := fun _ : α => c }; Nonempty (@ACR.APS α _ _ hR)) ↔ (Monotone (fun x : α => □x) ∧ ∃ c : α, (⊤ : α) ≤ c ∧ c ≤ □c)

∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] (k : ℕ), 0 < k → (∃ x : α, x ≤ ((fun z => □z)^[k]) x ∧ Set.Finite {y : α | ∃ n : ℕ, (((fun z => □z)^[k])^[n]) x = y}) → ∃ h : α, h ≐ ((fun z => □z)^[k]) h

∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] (k : ℕ) {x : α} {m n : ℕ}, 0 < k → x ≤ ((fun z : α => □z)^[k]) x → m < n → ((((fun z : α => □z)^[k])^[m]) x ≐ (((fun z : α => □z)^[k])^[n]) x) → ∃ h : α, h ≐ ((fun z : α => □z)^[k]) h
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] {x : α} {m n : ℕ}, x ≤ □x → m < n → ((fun z : α => □z)^[m]) x ≐ ((fun z : α => □z)^[n]) x → ∃ h : α, h ≐ □h
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], (∃ h : α, h ≐ □h) ↔ ∃ x : α, x ≤ □x ∧ ∃ m n : ℕ, m < n ∧ ((fun z : α => □z)^[m]) x ≐ ((fun z : α => □z)^[n]) x

∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] (k : ℕ), 0 < k → Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) → (∃ g : ACR.GödelFixpoint α, ∃ m n : ℕ, m < n ∧ ((((fun z : α => □z)^[k])^[m]) g.1 ≐ (((fun z : α => □z)^[k])^[n]) g.1)) → Nonempty (ACR.HenkinFixpoint α)

∃ α : Type*, ∃ _ : ACR α, ∃ _ : ACR.Prov α, ∃ _ : ACR.Reft α, ∃ _ : ACR.APS α, ∃ _ : ACR.C5 α, ACR.Consistent α ∧ ¬ Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) ∧ ∀ k : ℕ, 0 < k → ∃ x : α, x ≐ ((fun z : α => □z)^[k]) x

∀ m : ℕ, 0 < m → ∃ α : Type*, ∃ _ : Fintype α, ∃ _ : ACR α, ∃ _ : ACR.Prov α, ∃ _ : ACR.Reft α, ∃ _ : ACR.APS α, ∃ _ : ACR.C5 α, ACR.Consistent α ∧ Fintype.card α = 2 * m ∧ ¬ Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) ∧ ∀ x : α, x ≐ □x

∀ n : ℕ, 2 ≤ n → ∃ (α : Type*) (_ : Fintype α) (_ : ACR α) (_ : ACR.Prov α) (_ : ACR.Reft α) (_ : ACR.APS α) (_ : ACR.C5 α), ACR.Consistent α ∧ (∀ x : α, x ≐ □x) ∧ (∀ x y : α, x ≤ y ∨ y ≤ x) ∧ (∀ x y : α, x ≤ y → y ≤ x → x = y) ∧ IsEmpty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) ∧ Fintype.card α = n
∀ (α : Type*) [Fintype α] [ACR α], Fintype.card α = 1 → ¬ ACR.Consistent α

∀ n : ℕ, 2 ≤ n → ∃ (α : Type*) (_ : Fintype α) (_ : ACR α) (_ : ACR.Prov α) (_ : ACR.Reft α) (_ : ACR.APS α) (_ : ACR.C5 α), ACR.Consistent α ∧ (∀ x : α, x ≐ □x) ∧ (∀ x y : α, x ≤ y ∨ y ≤ x) ∧ (∀ x y : α, x ≤ y → y ≤ x → x = y) ∧ Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) ∧ Fintype.card α = n
∀ n : ℕ, (∃ (α : Type*) (_ : Fintype α) (_ : ACR α), ACR.Consistent α ∧ Fintype.card α = n) ↔ 2 ≤ n

Any bounded preorder with a greatest element admits a canonical trivial-`□`/constant-`⊠` realization: taking `□x = x` and `⊠x = ⊤` yields the APS axioms, and if `¬ ((⊤ : α) ≤ ⊥)` then the resulting structure is consistent and has a Gödel fixed point.
∀ α : Type*, (∃ (_ : ACR α), ACR.Consistent α) ↔ Nontrivial α
∀ α : Type*, (∃ h : ACR α, True) ↔ Nonempty α
∀ α : Type*, (∀ h : ACR α, ¬ @ACR.Consistent α h) ↔ Subsingleton α
Every nontrivial bounded linear order admits a canonical realization with `□x = x` and `⊠x = ⊤` that satisfies `ACR`, `Prov`, `Reft`, `APS`, and `C5`, is consistent, and has a Gödel fixpoint.
∀ α : Type*, (∃ (_ : ACR α) (_ : ACR.Prov α) (_ : ACR.Reft α) (_ : ACR.APS α) (_ : ACR.C5 α), ∀ x : α, x ≐ □x) ↔ Nonempty α
∀ α : Type*, (∃ (_ : ACR α) (_ : ACR.Prov α) (_ : ACR.Reft α) (_ : ACR.APS α) (_ : ACR.C5 α), ACR.Consistent α ∧ ∀ x : α, x ≐ □x) ↔ Nontrivial α

For every type `α`, any `ACR + Prov + Reft + APS + C5` realization on `α` with `∀ x : α, x ≐ □x` satisfies `Nonempty (ACR.HenkinFixpoint α) ↔ Nonempty α`, and in the canonical trivial-`□` regime every element of `α` is a Henkin fixed point.

For every type `α`, any consistent `ACR + Prov + Reft + APS + C5` realization on `α` with `∀ x : α, x ≐ □x` and `∀ x : α, ⊠x ≐ ⊤` satisfies `Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) ↔ ∃ x : α, x ≐ ⊤`, and moreover every Gödel fixed point is equivalent to `⊤`.
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], (∀ x : α, x ≐ ⊠x) → ACR.Inconsistent α
∀ (α : Type*) [LinearOrder α] [BoundedOrder α] [Nontrivial α], letI := Classical.choose (thm_bounded_linear_canonical_realization_000122 (α := α)); ∀ g : ACR.GödelFixpoint α, g.1 ≐ (⊤ : α)
